strategy_description: Local IV smile: bisection IV on each VEV, quadratic fit in log-moneyness on closest 6 strikes to EMA(S); BS fair per strike with extrapolated wing IV; MM edge 2 on vouchers, extract, hydrogel. DTE from round3description + plot_iv_smile_round3 (CSV day d: DTE_open=8-d, intraday wind-down); csv_day inferred from opening extract mid (5250/5245/5267.5). Smile refit every 80 ticks for runtime.
Same as iteration 0 but CLOSEST_K=3 (parameter sweep); tape analysis suggested k=6 had lower IV RMSE than k=3 but backtest PnL was worse, so k=6 retained for primary line.
